data.hyperedge_name: <hyperedge>"Maximum loan amount: 90% of current cash surrender value."
<hyperedge>"Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary: Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest."
<hyperedge>"If the insured dies by suicide within two years from the issue date, we will pay only the premiums paid, without interest."
<hyperedge>"'Paid-Up Insurance' - A reduced death benefit with no further premiums required."
<hyperedge>"If total indebtedness exceeds the cash value, the policy will terminate unless sufficient payment is made within 31 days of notice."
<hyperedge>"This is a participating policy. Annual dividends may be declared based on our mortality, investment, and expense experience."
<hyperedge>"You may borrow against the cash value after the policy has been in force for one full year."
<hyperedge>"WHOLE LIFE INSURANCE POLICY"
<hyperedge>"If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for three years, you may elect:"
<hyperedge>"'Policy Loan' - A loan made by us using the cash value as collateral."
<hyperedge>"Dividends are not guaranteed."
<hyperedge>"REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount based on cash value and insured's attained age."
<hyperedge>"Premiums paid, without interest."
<hyperedge>"CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and terminate the policy."
<hyperedge>"Name: Margaret Rose Chen"
<hyperedge>"This policy builds cash value according to the guaranteed schedule shown in the policy values table."
<hyperedge>"Outstanding loans and accrued interest will be deducted from the death benefit or cash surrender value."

"DIVIDEND OPTIONS (select one):
✓ Cash Payment - Dividend paid directly to you
□ Premium Reduction - Applied to reduce next premium
□ Accumulate at Interest - Left with us to accumulate
□ Paid-Up Additions - Purchase additional insurance
[Current selection: Paid-Up Additions]"
<hyperedge>"Payment will be made within 7 days of receiving complete claim documentation."
<hyperedge>"If the insured's age was misstated, we will adjust the face amount to what the premium would have purchased at the correct age."
<hyperedge>"EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums."
<hyperedge>"Face Amount: $250,000"
<hyperedge>"Cash value grows on a tax-deferred basis."
<hyperedge>"A loan made by us using the cash value as collateral."
<hyperedge>"Loan interest rate: 5% per annum, compounded annually."
<hyperedge>"You may cancel this policy within 30 days of receipt for a full refund of premiums paid."
<hyperedge>"Primary: David Chen (Husband) - 100%"
<hyperedge>"We may contest this policy only within the first two years while the insured is living, and only for material misrepresentation in the application."
<hyperedge>"Guaranteed cash value at end of Year 10: $28,450"
<hyperedge>"GUARDIAN FAMILY PROTECTION CORP. Issued at: Boston, Massachusetts."
<hyperedge>"If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended Term Insurance will automatically apply."
<hyperedge>"Interest may be paid annually or added to the loan balance."
<hyperedge>"'Cash Surrender Value' - The amount available if the policy is surrendered, equal to the cash value minus any outstanding loans and surrender charges."
<hyperedge>"Guaranteed cash value at end of Year 20: $71,200"
<hyperedge>"'Dividend' - A return of premium that may be declared annually by the Board of Directors based on company experience."
<hyperedge>"Actual cash value may be higher due to dividend credits."

<hyperedge>"You may reinstate this policy within 3 years of lapse if: (a) You provide evidence of insurability satisfactory to us (b) You pay all overdue premiums with interest at 6% per annum (c) You repay or reinstate any policy loans with interest."
